analysis_commentary: Regressed on GOAL-1A: last-probe legal_mass=0.065 vs baseline 0.597, max_prob=0.38 vs 0.14 (2.7×, getting close to GOAL-1B 0.90 threshold). pEnt held high (6.69-6.92) and ran to timer, so lower lr did dampen update magnitude — but it also dampened learning progress. Same 538 steps. 1 arena, no promotion.
